name: NETEASE     DRN
summary: NETEASE DRN represents Brazilian Depositary Receipts (BDRs) of NetEase Inc., a Chinese technology company providing online services focused on gaming, e-commerce, and media content. Each BDR represents a fraction or multiple of a share of the underlying company (NetEase). These BDRs allow Brazilian investors to invest in foreign companies listed on exchanges outside of Brazil.
